notes: Exceptional execution. Agent identified all 3 boot events (Jun 9, Jun 10, Jul 27), catalogued 40 services with precise start/stop timestamps, documented CUPS' 17 startups across 14 weekly cycles with root-cause analysis (logrotate-driven), provided 5-tier service dependency hierarchy with ASCII graph, and estimated uptimes (29.4h, 47.1d, 49.3d). Report includes boot/runtime event tables, per-service inventory, CUPS chronology, dependency tier analysis, and appendix notes on logrotate failures and mdmpd startup failures. Markdown structure is professional with clear sections. No rule violations; log analysis was thorough and accurate.
